channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bag dumped, 5th July
item.description:
Please collect
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Lots of litter on street, 5th July
item.description:
Please clear
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Out Prospects House, 5th July
item.description:
Dear Staff, Could you please assist with the removal of a rough sleeper's tent and personal items as he is now rehoused.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter on street, 5th July
item.description:
Please also collect litter from around base of trees
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding requires, 5th July
item.description:
Reported previously, someone came but didn’t do his job properly- lots of weeds been left behind Another request/report been sent but still nothing 😑🙄 I pass by East Dulwich almost on daily basis and can see Southwark team removing almost invisible weeds regularly on Court Lane, Woodward rd and Dulwich Square - because is Dulwich?! And posh people live there?! We’re in Peckham , we’re also human beings and deserve to live in tidy environment, we pay high taxes! Please attend and finish the weeding job properly!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak in street. Has been goong on for 2 weeks, 5th July
item.description:
Water leak in street. Has been goong on for 2 weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Auckland Rise, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter next to bin in play area., 5th July
item.description:
Large amount of litter including glass beer bottles in children's play area in Cator Park. Litter is next to a bin but has been as spread by animals.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bailes Place, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter needs clearing on Carlton Parade, 5th July
item.description:
All of Carlton Parade needs cleaning blankets pillow and lots of litter opposite the Co op thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Carlton Parade, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outgrown bushes, 5th July
item.description:
The grass and bushes within the railing is cut regularly but not on the pathways recently for some reasons. In Linzel Estate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boscombe Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottles of wee, 5th July
item.description:
Dumped bottle of urine for about 3 weeks. In front of 17 Boscombe Close

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boscombe Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish strewn all over Daubney Fields, 5th July
item.description:
Bin bags left by bins ripped open and rubbish all over the park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsmead Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 5th July
item.description:
Street cleaner not sweeping, only changing bins. Street is a mess!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not clean the place for long time, 5th July
item.description:
No clean the place

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fore Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste dumped, 5th July
item.description:
Domestic waste dumped overnight. Includes INCONTINENCE WASTE. HEALTH and SAFETY ISSUE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pier Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 5th July
item.description:
Dead fox in the long grass at the entrance to the rec near Westbourne
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbourne Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Bags of litter, 5th July
item.description:
Someone has left bags of household waste on the corner. It is now pulled open by animals and is all over the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
